overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night. The character exits a restroom, traverses neon-lit alleyways, and enters the Afterlife bar through a stairwell and corridor, ending in the main bar area with green neon lighting.

events.description: character turns toward the exit and leaves the restroom area

agents.ego_description: character walking through a dimly lit restroom with tiled floors and wall-mounted sinks, then heading toward the exit

entered.detail: row of white ceramic sinks with silver faucets mounted on the wall
large rectangular mirrors above the sinks reflecting the dim interior
light-colored square tiles covering the restroom floor
fluorescent light fixtures providing dim illumination from above
dark stall doors visible in the background corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit public restroom with tiled floors and wall-mounted sinks. The character walks through the space, passing mirrors and fluorescent lighting, then turns toward the exit doorway to leave the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with towering buildings and neon signage

events.description: exits the indoor restroom into the dark outdoor alleyway of Night City
shifts from artificial indoor lighting to dark outdoor environment with neon accents

agents.ego_description: character exits the building into a dark neon-lit alleyway with tall buildings looming overhead

entered.detail: large green neon 'M' logo mounted on the side of a building
towering skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
dark-colored futuristic vehicle parked along the alley wall
industrial metal framework attached to building facades
wet asphalt surface reflecting the neon lights

segments.scene_description: The character steps out of the restroom into a narrow Night City alley at night. A large green neon 'M' sign glows on the left while towering buildings with illuminated windows rise in the background. A futuristic car is parked on the right as the character walks along the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub entrance with bright neon archway and pink signage

events.description: approaches the entrance doors of the club, slowing slightly

agents.ego_description: walking toward the brightly lit nightclub entrance with cyan and pink neon lights, passing a parked car

horizontal pink neon lights above the entrance doors

dark doorway entrance at the end of the neon-lit path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a vibrant nightclub entrance framed by a large cyan neon archway. Pink neon strips glow above the doorway while a few NPCs stand conversing near the entrance. The camera moves steadily toward the doors, leaving the alley behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stairwell with green lighting and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: enters the building from the street, moving into a dimly lit stairwell
shifts from bright neon exterior to dim green interior lighting

agents.ego_description: entering the building and descending a stairwell with green lighting and graffiti on the walls

entered.detail: concrete stairs descending into the lower level with metal edges
walls covered with colorful graffiti and posters
green-tinted lighting fixtures illuminating the stairwell
metal handrail along the left side of the stairs
scattered trash and debris piled in the corner

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building and descends into a narrow stairwell illuminated by green lights. The walls are covered in graffiti and posters, with trash debris visible in corners. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the bright neon exterior to this dim, enclosed interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with Afterlife neon sign and vending machines

events.description: enters the main corridor leading to the Afterlife bar

agents.ego_description: walking down a corridor with green neon lighting and the 'AFTERLIFE' sign overhead, passing NPCs standing along the walls

person standing near the vending machine on the left

vending machine with 'NGM' branding glowing red
large metal pipes running along the right wall
green neon light strips embedded in the floor along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the iconic Afterlife corridor, marked by the large green neon sign overhead. The industrial space features vending machines on both sides, exposed pipes along the walls, and green neon strips lighting the floor. Several NPCs stand along the walls as the character walks toward the main bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar interior with neon-lit counter and holographic displays

events.description: enters the main Afterlife bar area from the corridor
slows down and pans slightly to observe the bar interior and patrons

agents.ego_description: exploring the Afterlife bar interior, observing the neon-lit counter, holographic displays, and various patrons standing and sitting around

patron standing near the bar counter facing the bartender

entered.detail: curved bar counter with green neon underlighting and bottles displayed behind

holographic display panels showing menu items floating in the air

stools lined up along the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main Afterlife bar, a large interior space dominated by a curved neon-lit bar counter on the left. Holographic menu displays float in the air while patrons stand and sit around the area. The space features industrial pillars, green neon lighting, and a cyberpunk aesthetic. The character slows to observe the environment, taking in the detailed bar interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile public restroom through the neon-drenched streets of Night City and into the industrial depths of the Afterlife bar. It begins in a dimly lit restroom with tiled floors and fluorescent lighting before the character exits into a narrow, wet alleyway dominated by a glowing green neon sign and towering skyscrapers. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from the dark alley toward a vibrant nightclub entrance framed by a cyan neon archway and pink light strips. The perspective then descends through a graffiti-covered stairwell, moving from the bright exterior into a dim, enclosed corridor lined with vending machines and exposed pipes under green neon strips. Finally, the space opens up into the main Afterlife bar, where the industrial atmosphere expands into a large interior featuring a curved neon counter and floating holographic displays.
